authority_boundary.functional_claim_perimeter: Mapping declared workflow evidence against specified policy requirements.
permitted_assertions: The system may assert that declared evidence was mapped to specified policy requirements.
prohibited_implications: The system may not imply compliance satisfaction.
The system may not imply legal advice.
The system may not imply audit sufficiency.

supported_claims.statement: Declared workflow evidence was mapped against specified policy requirements.
supported_claims.scope: Specified policy requirement set and declared evidence only.
conditions: Applies only to declared policy requirements and supplied upstream evidence.
limitations: Does not establish legal advice, audit sufficiency, or institutional risk acceptance.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of compliance satisfaction is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Compliance satisfaction requires an authorized compliance role and remains outside this placement profile.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of legal admissibility is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Legal admissibility requires separate legal process and authority.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of decision correctness is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: The placement profile declares boundaries and does not validate downstream decisions.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of legal advice is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Legal advice requires an authorized legal reviewer.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of audit sufficiency is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Audit sufficiency requires an authorized audit process.

explicit_non_claims.statement: No claim of institutional risk acceptance is made.
explicit_non_claims.rationale: Risk acceptance requires an authorized institutional risk owner.

handoff_requirements.reason: Policy mapping requires authorized compliance review before any compliance conclusion is asserted.

non_transitive_clauses.statement: Compliance mapping does not propagate as compliance satisfaction unless an authorized compliance role explicitly asserts that conclusion.
